message:
fix: propagate subcommand --robot flag through OutputContext

Move command_requests_robot_json from main.rs to cli/mod.rs as a public
helper so OutputContext::detect_mode_with_env can consult per-subcommand
--robot flags directly.  This ensures commands like `sync --robot`
produce JSON output without relying solely on the global --json flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ struct SyncPathPolicy {
 /// Returns an error if the database cannot be opened or the sync operation fails.
 pub fn execute(
     args: &SyncArgs,
-    json: bool,
+    _json: bool,
     cli: &config::CliOverrides,
     ctx: &OutputContext,
 ) -> Result<()> {
@@ -137,7 +137,7 @@ pub fn execute(
             &beads_dir,
             &path_policy,
             args,
-            json,
+            use_json,
             show_progress,
             retention_days,
             ctx,
@@ -147,7 +147,7 @@ pub fn execute(
             &mut storage,
             &path_policy,
             args,
-            json,
+            use_json,
             show_progress,
             retention_days,
             cli,
